WORK EXPERIENCE
Senior Generative AI Specialist (Jan 24 – Present)
Reporting & Data Analyst (Dec 22 – Dec 23)
Buzzboard India Pvt Ltd.                                                                         Hyderabad, India
Skills: Data Analysis, AWS Quick site, Microsoft Excel, Mixpanel, GPT Prompt, GPT API.
·         Conducted data analysis and prepared business reports, aiding decision-making processes. Utilized AWS Quicksight, Google Docs, and Mixpanel, improving efficiency by 20%. 
·         Explored AI prompts and tools, automating product features via Python APIs. This streamlined processes, reducing manual effort by 30% and optimizing workflow efficiencies.
·         Pioneered generative AI initiatives, utilizing Langchain and RAG technologies to craft cutting-edge models. Engineered an architecture harnessing a spectrum of LLM models, including GPT-4, Anthropic, Google Text Bison, and Gemini Pro, enhancing productivity and fostering innovation across the organization.
·         Orchestrated the development of a Chabot utilizing the anthropic model, revolutionizing employee support systems. Decreased onboarding time for new hires by 50%, facilitating seamless access to resources and boosting workplace efficiency.
·         Developed a Python-based generative model for website content, cutting down copywriting time by 75%. Improved content quality and reduced errors significantly.
Led the implementation of a blog generation model, scaling up monthly production from 4-5 to 400 blogs. Boosted SEO performance, driving a twofold increase in user engagement on the website.
Data Science Trainee (03/2022 – 11/2022)
Almabetter                                                                                 Bengaluru, India
Skills: Data Science, Python, Tableau, SQL, Predictive Modelling, Critical Thinking.
·         Performed Data Visualization & Feature Engineering, Teamwork, Time Management, 
Problem-Solving. Used tools like Tableau, Power BI, PostgreSQL, Google Colaboratory and Scikit-learn. Gained proficiency in Python & SQL.·        
 Worked on real-world projects like Bike Sharing Demand Prediction (Regression),
Airline Passenger Referral Prediction (Classification), Bot-Class-Prediction. Built 
an interactive Tableau dashboard for EDA on Global Terrorism Analysis.

 
Technical Support Executive (12/2020 - 10/2021)
Datacomp Web Technologies Pvt Ltd.                                      New Delhi, India
Skills: Team Management, Data Analysis, Microsoft Excel, Microsoft Power-Point, RPA.
· Assisted team members in optimizing technical solutions & source Data Analysis.·         
Maintained existing client database in MS-Excel using a Pivot-Tables, Filtering, and Sorting and initialized 120 new client data by extending RPA solutions.

What do we call that structure where we hit the api through a key?

The structure where you hit an API using a key is commonly known as API authentication or API key authentication. The key used to authenticate requests is often referred to as an API key, which is a unique identifier used to authenticate a client or user when making API calls to a server. The API key acts like a password to control access to the API and ensure that only authorized users or services can use it. 

When an API request is made, the key is included in the request header or as a query parameter, and the server checks the key against its records to determine if the request is allowed. This mechanism helps to prevent unauthorized access and track API usage.

Data-driven AI specialist | Leveraging GPT & Python to automate & innovate | Boosted blog output & website copywriting efficiency | Building the future of work with cutting-edge AI.

I am, a highly motivated professional engineer with a deep passion for utilizing data analysis and AI to drive product innovation and business transformation. Leveraging 2+ years of hands-on experience in Python, SQL, and various data science tools, I'm currently honing my skills through the Almabetter Full Stack Data Scientist program.

My core strengths lie in:

- Extracting actionable insights: I transform product usage and user activity data into strategic insights using advanced analytics tools like AWS QuickSight, Google Docs, and Mixpanel, driving informed decision-making.
- Automating with intelligence: I actively research Generative AI prompts and tools, identifying opportunities to automate product features and streamline internal processes for enhanced efficiency, all implemented through Python's capabilities.
- Building with purpose: I leverage my Python proficiency to construct LLMs (large language models) that unlock novel avenues for innovation and growth, propelling organizations forward.
- Leading by example: I demonstrate strong project management skills, ensuring successful delivery and fostering effective collaboration within data science teams.

My accomplishments include:
- Successfully implemented Regression and Classification models using Python.
- Secured AIR 11 in the International Go-Kart Championship (March 2018), demonstrating my engineering expertise and drive for innovation.
- Completed both the Spark Foundation's Data Science and Business Analytics Internship and 32-week Almabetter's Full Stack Data Science program.
- Developed interactive Tableau dashboards for comprehensive data exploration and analysis.
- I'm eager to join a team at the forefront of data-driven innovation, where I can contribute my skills and passion to solve complex problems and achieve exceptional results. Let's connect and discuss how I can be a valuable asset to your team!
